title: Quick Attack panel — arbitrary domain/IP probes
description:
## Summary

- Adds a new **⚔️ Quick Attack** sidebar section to the local pentest dashboard
- User types any domain and/or IPv4/IPv6 address; 9 parameterised recon/vuln probes fire against it (Ping+HTTP, Nmap Top-100, Nmap Full, HTTP Headers, SSL/TLS, WhatWeb, Nikto, Nuclei, Dir Brute)
- Pure frontend change — commands built client-side, submitted to existing `POST /api/scan/run`; no backend changes

## Test Plan

- [ ] Navigate to Quick Attack in sidebar — section renders, "Fill at least one field…" hint shown
- [ ] Type a domain (e.g. `example.com`) — target/URL info appears, all 9 Run buttons become active
- [ ] Run **HTTP Headers** probe — terminal streams curl output, shows `● done` on completion
- [ ] Run **Nmap Full** probe, click Kill — stream stops, `[killed by user]` appended, running indicator clears
- [ ] Click **→ Finding** after a completed probe — navigates to Findings section with pre-filled title
- [ ] Clear domain, enter an IP (`1.2.3.4`) — URL shows `http://1.2.3.4`, probes still work
- [ ] Edit target fields while scan is idle — terminal output is not wiped
- [ ] DevTools console shows no JS errors throughout

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
